evt_014.label: Drop
evt_014.basis: The unnamed financial sponsor declined interest shortly after signing its confidentiality agreement, with no filing-grounded valuation comparison.
evt_014.source_text: Except for one financial sponsor that declined interest shortly after executing its confidentiality agreement.

evt_018.label: Drop
evt_018.basis: Strategic 1 withdrew because the acquisition was not a strategic fit, which is a plain bidder withdrawal.
evt_018.source_text: Strategic 1 informed Barclays that after further internal consideration, an acquisition of the Company would not be a strategic fit for it, and therefore it was no longer interested in participating in the strategic process.

evt_019.label: Drop
evt_019.basis: Strategic 2 withdrew because of other internal corporate priorities, with no filing-grounded price comparison.
evt_019.source_text: because of other internal corporate priorities, it was no longer interested in exploring a potential transaction with the Company.

evt_020.label: Drop
evt_020.basis: Strategic 3 withdrew because of other corporate priorities and technology overlap, which is a plain bidder withdrawal.
evt_020.source_text: because of its internal focus on other corporate transactions and a perceived overlap in technologies, it was no longer interested in exploring a potential transaction with the Company.

evt_023.label: DropAtInf
evt_023.basis: Sponsor A said any second-round bid would not be meaningfully higher than its June 9 informal indication, so it dropped at its prior informal level.
evt_023.source_text: if it were to submit a second round bid, it would not be meaningfully higher than the price indicated in its June 9, 2016 preliminary indication of interest.

evt_024.label: DropBelowInf
evt_024.basis: Sponsor B said any final bid would be significantly below its June 9 informal indication, so the drop was below its earlier informal bid.
evt_024.source_text: if it were to submit a final bid, it would be significantly below the price indicated in its June 9, 2016 preliminary indication of interest.

cycle_1.basis: First formal proposal in cycle: evt_025.

initiation_judgment.basis: Thoma Bravo approached Imprivata repeatedly before the board launched a sale process, and the board's decision expressly considered Thoma Bravo's indication of interest.
initiation_judgment.source_text: June 2015, representatives of Thoma Bravo informally approached and had brief meetings with representatives of the Company, and expressed Thoma Bravo's potential interest in exploring a possible business transaction with the Company.

advisor_barclays.source_text: The Board engaged Barclays as the Company's financial advisor

advisor_goodwin.source_text: representatives of the Company's outside legal counsel, Goodwin Procter LLP

advisor_kirkland.source_text: Thoma Bravo's outside counsel, Kirkland & Ellis LLP

count_reconciliation.assertion: Seven parties executed confidentiality agreements with the Company.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly across the seven NDA signers extracted in the process chronology.

count_reconciliation.assertion: Barclays contacted and had discussions with 15 potentially interested parties.
count_reconciliation.note: The extract names eight bidder actors individually or as a grouped unnamed sponsor, leaving seven contacted parties unnamed in the filing chronology.
